// Fail closed: Holder is declared in another file, not visible here, so
// Holder.LOG's type cannot be resolved - no capture.
class HolderCrossFile {
    void m() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            Holder.LOG.error("boom", e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
